title: stichorkis pusilla
intro: Stichorkis pusilla, also known as the small stichorkis, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stichorkis pusilla include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
